creator: larse@isi.edu
text:
The xscreensaver port fails to install either
driver/xscreensaver-demo-Gtk or driver/xscreensaver-demo-Xm
as /usr/X11R6/bin/xscreensaver-demo, causing execution to fail.

Fix: 

cp /usr/ports/x11/xscreensaver/work/xscreensaver-3.26/driver/xscreensaver-demo-Gtk /usr/X11R6/bin/xscreensaver-demo
How-To-Repeat: cd /usr/ports/x11/xscreensaver && make install
